testsuite.name: com.planit.runners.TestRunner

testcase.name: runScenario[0]("Contact form shows validation errors on empty submit and clears them after filling fields", "Jupiter Toys Application Tests")
runScenario[1]("Successful contact form submission", "Jupiter Toys Application Tests")
runScenario[2]("Successful contact form submission", "Jupiter Toys Application Tests")
runScenario[3]("Successful contact form submission", "Jupiter Toys Application Tests")
runScenario[4]("Successful contact form submission", "Jupiter Toys Application Tests")
runScenario[5]("Successful contact form submission", "Jupiter Toys Application Tests")
runScenario[6]("Cart subtotals and grand total are calculated correctly", "Jupiter Toys Application Tests")

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: [Subtotal for 'Fluffy Bunny' should be 49.95 (unit price 9.99 Ã— 5)] expected: 49.95 but was: 39.96

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: [Subtotal for 'Fluffy Bunny' should be 49.95 (unit price 9.99 Ã— 5)] expected: 49.95 but was: 39.96 at com.planit.stepdefs.CartSteps.theSubtotalForShouldEqualUnitPriceMultipliedBy(CartSteps.java:81) at ✽.the subtotal for "Fluffy Bunny" should equal unit price multiplied by 5(classpath:features/jupiter_toys.feature:45)
